title: GEO Group Florida
subtitle: From Parasite to Commonwealth
chapter: Chapters 8 and 11 · GEO Group Florida Lab · BioBond / Capstone Bridge
coreQuestion: What would it take to move a captive-population institution from extraction architecture toward moral-commons repair?

biobondSteps.title: FHRI-indexed margin ratchet
biobondSteps.summary: Capital cost rises when FHRI_max remains below functional thresholds and falls as coordination capacity improves.
biobondSteps.teaching: This changes the financial meaning of rehabilitation capacity: repair becomes economically rewarded rather than treated as cost leakage.

biobondSteps.title: Hysteresis recovery tranche
biobondSteps.summary: Early funds restore the biological and staffing floor before programming expansion is expected to work.
biobondSteps.teaching: A damaged coordination substrate cannot use new programming funds effectively until stress, turnover, violence, and staffing instability are addressed.

biobondSteps.title: Public Benefit Corporation identity kernel
biobondSteps.summary: A PBC structure changes the governance access condition by including mission-aligned fiduciary duties and affected-party representation.
biobondSteps.teaching: The question is not whether better people enter the same structure; the question is whether the structure changes who can govern the mission-critical channel.

maathaiPathway.title: Measurement infrastructure + ACP support
maathaiPathway.detail: Build public FHRI measurement, family/advocate lookup tools, and regulatory comments supporting beneficial ownership disclosure.

maathaiPathway.title: Pilot BioBond for low-epsilon alternatives
maathaiPathway.detail: Capitalize an already functioning alternative such as Unchained Industries and measure recidivism, employment, staff stability, and FHRI improvement.

maathaiPathway.title: Market pressure and contract renegotiation
maathaiPathway.detail: Use measured alternatives to create a public evidence basis for contract standards and FHRI floors.

journalQuestions: The correctional officer at a GEO Group Florida facility with 43% annual turnover probability experiences a Boisjoly-like dynamic: anomaly reports can be structurally absorbed without response. Where does your moral sympathy instinctively go in this case — and does P-SAGE change who you identify as the responsible party?

The source app argues that an ACA 100% accreditation score can be consistent with FHRI_max = 10.9 because ACA measures the Sign, not the Interpretant. Identify another institution where high scores on surface compliance could conceal replaced purpose.

The BioBond margin ratchet makes FHRI_max improvement financially rational. Design one element of a BioBond for a different institution or sector. What is the improvement trigger, and what structural change does it require?

Maathai planted trees. Unchained Industries employs formerly incarcerated workers at living wages. In your own structural position, what is the equivalent low-epsilon alternative you could help build, tend, or scale?

The scale-free law says the IPS mechanism can recur across sectors. In a professional field you may enter, what is the likely access mechanism through which an extraction architecture could replace the original mission?

evidenceStatus.Public source app: The original Three-Scenario-Sims GEO Florida page, migrated into the EECSL case shell.
evidenceStatus.Case domain: Private correctional facilities, Florida DOC contracting, programming budget allocation, rehabilitation capacity, staffing, recidivism, and public accountability.
evidenceStatus.Directly stated source-app values: FHRI_max = 10.9; ε=.650, φ=.720, ρ=.550, σ=.780, μ=.840; staff turnover 43%; programming 0.6% of revenue; debt service + management approximately 65%; long-term debt $1.9B; recidivism increase +6.5 to +8.6%; cross-sector FHRI comparisons.
evidenceStatus.Data-source categories named in source a: GEO Group 10-K filings, Florida DOC inspection reports, OSHA findings, AFSC Investigate, Bloomberg private-prison violence analysis, Mukherjee 2016, and In the Public Interest research briefs.
evidenceStatus.Computed model output: FHRI_max, extraction/entropy/misalignment indicators, BioBond recovery path, scale-free comparison, and repair leverage.
evidenceStatus.Interpretive model claim: Triadic Overwrite, P-adic access through ownership architecture, programming-budget signal capture, Sign/Interpretant gap, moral-commons repair, and Maathai bottom-up alternative-building.
evidenceStatus.Verification needed: Verify each numerical claim against source documents; distinguish facility-level values from sector-level proxies; check legal, contract, and ownership details before reviewer-facing empirical use.
